We introduce locality-sensitive bucketing (LSB) funct
functions by allowing it to map a sequence into mu
functions easier to construct, while guaranteeing hig
ner. We construct such functions, prove their proper
proposed criteria. We also reveal several properties
independent interests for studying LSH functions an

to design (d1, d2)-sensitive functions that are not c
